exercises.title: Combinatorial Encoding
exercises.description: Implement message encoding as error positions.
exercises.task: Create bijective encoding between messages and weight-t errors.

exercises.title: Size Comparison
exercises.task: Calculate and compare ciphertext and key sizes.

hints: Decrypt: S^-1, then decode, then unpermute
